primary_operations.name: Get
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp, err := c.client.R().Get(url); if err != nil { return nil, err }; return resp.Body(), nil

primary_operations.name: Post
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp, err := c.client.R().SetBody(body).Post(url); if err != nil { return nil, err }; return resp.Body(), nil

code_style_notes: resty auto-buffers the response body — no defer Close() needed
